title: SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: AUTISM SOCIETY OF OREGON SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of virtual and in-person support groups. 9320 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 240 Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Anyone in the austism community, along with their parents, caregivers, and supporters Hours: Varies by group Email (503) 636-1676 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 636-1676 Toll-free (888) 288-4761 888-AUTISM-1 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Autism Spectrum Disorder Parent Support Groups * Autism Spectrum Disorder Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER INFORMATION AND RESOURCES INFORMATION SERVICES - EVENT CALENDAR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AUTISM SOCIETY OF OREGON
